Pendant

Pendant Of The Ice Sprit

A pendant crafted from an Ice Crystal infused with the lingering essence of a spirit.While carrying this pendant, using Warmth Essence will grant you the Warmth buff—a protective heat that allows you to withstand the harsh blizzard within the cave.

농작물

Luna Flower

A blossom that glows brightest under the full moon. It is said to absorb and store the moon’s light, using it to mend fractured souls. Those who stand near it can feel the warmth of life and the quiet pulse of light—gentle yet unyielding, like the moon itself.

농작물
Luna Flower
A blossom that glows brightest under the full moon. It is said to absorb and store the moon’s light, using it to mend fractured souls. Those who stand near it can feel the warmth of life and the quiet pulse of light—gentle yet unyielding, like the moon itself.
ItemRowName Quest_M2_LunaFlower
ItemRarity Poor
MaxStackSize 9999
Reusable FALSE
Extract

Luna Flower Extract

An essence distilled from the Luna Flower, radiating a concentrated moonlight. Its touch carries the gentle yet potent power of healing-like moonlight condensed into liquid form.

Extract
Luna Flower Extract
An essence distilled from the Luna Flower, radiating a concentrated moonlight. Its touch carries the gentle yet potent power of healing-like moonlight condensed into liquid form.
ItemRowName Quest_M2_LunaFlowerExtract
ItemRarity Poor
MaxStackSize 9999
Reusable FALSE

ItemRowName Quest_M2_SpiritsEnergy
ItemRarity Poor
MaxStackSize 9999
Reusable FALSE
농작물

Under Flower

A flower found in the underworld of Olympus. It is said to cradle wandering souls, giving them rest until a new vessel for reincarnation is prepared. Though it emanates a shadowy aura, one can still feel a faint pulse of life within it—proof that even in death, the cycle never truly ends.

농작물
Under Flower
A flower found in the underworld of Olympus. It is said to cradle wandering souls, giving them rest until a new vessel for reincarnation is prepared. Though it emanates a shadowy aura, one can still feel a faint pulse of life within it—proof that even in death, the cycle never truly ends.
ItemRowName Quest_M3_UnderFlower
ItemRarity Poor
MaxStackSize 9999
Reusable FALSE
Letter

Hades’ Letter

A heartfelt letter written by Hades himself. Ancient runes of powerful sorcery are etched between the lines, and the deep scent of the Under Flower lingers in the parchment. Yet, the bright glow of the Luna Flower gently wraps around it—light embracing the darkness, as if even death wished to speak of love.

Letter
Hades’ Letter
A heartfelt letter written by Hades himself. Ancient runes of powerful sorcery are etched between the lines, and the deep scent of the Under Flower lingers in the parchment. Yet, the bright glow of the Luna Flower gently wraps around it—light embracing the darkness, as if even death wished to speak of love.
ItemRowName Quest_M3_Letter
ItemRarity Uniqe
MaxStackSize 1
Reusable FALSE

Pendant

Hammer

A pendant crafted from an Ice Crystal infused with the lingering essence of a spirit.While carrying this pendant, using Warmth Essence will grant you the Warmth buff—a protective heat that allows you to withstand the harsh blizzard within the cave.

Pendant
Hammer
A pendant crafted from an Ice Crystal infused with the lingering essence of a spirit.While carrying this pendant, using Warmth Essence will grant you the Warmth buff—a protective heat that allows you to withstand the harsh blizzard within the cave.
ItemRowName Quest_SK0_Hammer
ItemRarity Poor
MaxStackSize 1
Reusable TRUE
Book

Windmill Training Manual

A temporary combat manual that grants access to the Windmill skill within the training room.Use it to unleash a powerful spinning attack that strikes all enemies nearby.Only usable inside the training facility. The effect wears off after leaving.

Title

.tab-btn { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); color: #888; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: bold; transition: all 0.3s ease; margin-right: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .tab-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #fff; border-color: rgba(252, 163, 17, 0.5); } .tab-btn.active { background: var(--accent-color); color: #000; border-color: var(--accent-color); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(252, 163, 17, 0.3); } .sub-tab { font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 6px 15px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 20px; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .dict-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-color: var(--accent-color); } .dict-card:hover h3 { color: var(--accent-color) !important; } #dict-search:focus { border-color: var(--accent-color); box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(252, 163, 17, 0.2); } #dict-modal-close:hover { color: #fff !important; } .search-hidden { display: none !important; }
